prompt: Generate the word 'DRIVE' embedded into the jeep body design from the first image with the same color with the car, using Canon’s font curves from the second image.
prompt_refined: Generate an image of the yellow jeep from image 1. Integrate the word 'DRIVE' onto the main side panel of the jeep's body, centered horizontally. The text 'DRIVE' should be rendered in the same yellow color and texture as the jeep's body, appearing as if subtly debossed or embossed into the vehicle's surface. Ensure the letters of 'DRIVE' replicate the specific font style and curves of the 'Canon' logo displayed in image 2.
objects: 'DRIVE' text on the main side panel of the jeep
'DRIVE' text centered horizontally on the side panel
'DRIVE' text in the same yellow color as the jeep's body
'DRIVE' text with the same texture as the jeep's body
'DRIVE' text appearing subtly debossed or embossed
